title: CRM & Lead Management
tagline: Never lose a lead again. Track every prospect from first contact to first class.
metaDesc: Gripmode CRM helps martial arts schools capture, nurture, and convert leads into paying members with automated follow-ups and pipeline tracking.
benefits: Capture leads from website, walk-ins, and referrals
Lead source tracking and ROI analysis

howItWorks.desc: Leads flow in automatically from your website forms, walk-in check-ins, referral links, and social media campaigns. Every lead is tagged with its source so you always know what's working.
Automated email and SMS sequences engage new leads within minutes. Gripmode sends trial invitations, follow-ups after no-shows, and re-engagement messages — all without you lifting a finger.
Your visual pipeline shows exactly where every prospect stands. Drag leads between stages, set reminders for personal follow-ups, and watch your conversion rate climb with real-time analytics.

title: Online Booking
tagline: Let students book classes, trials, and privates online — 24/7.
metaDesc: Online booking system for martial arts schools. Let students book classes, trial sessions, and private lessons anytime.
benefits: 24/7 online booking for classes and trials

howItWorks.desc: Add the Gripmode booking widget to your website or share a direct booking link. Prospective students see real-time availability and can book a trial or regular class in seconds.
Instant confirmation emails go out with class details, location, and what to bring. Automated reminders fire 24 hours and 1 hour before — dramatically reducing no-shows.
Students check in via tablet kiosk, QR code, or front desk. Attendance is logged automatically, feeding into your retention analytics and coach payroll calculations.

title: Class Scheduling
tagline: Build, manage, and optimize your class schedule without the spreadsheet chaos.
metaDesc: Smart class scheduling for martial arts schools. Weekly grid view, multi-coach assignment, schedule cloning, and conflict detection.

howItWorks.desc: Drag and drop classes onto a visual weekly grid. Set times, assign coaches, define capacity limits, and choose which belt levels can attend — all from one screen.
Assign primary and assistant coaches to each class. Gripmode checks for scheduling conflicts automatically and alerts you if a coach is double-booked or unavailable.
Hit publish and your schedule goes live on your website, booking widget, and student app. Clone the entire week forward and make adjustments as needed — no more rebuilding from scratch.

title: Automated Payroll
tagline: Stop calculating coach pay manually. Gripmode handles class pay, privates, commissions, and salaries.
metaDesc: Automated payroll for martial arts schools. Calculate class pay, private lesson rates, commissions, and salaries automatically with period locking.
benefits: Multiple pay types: hourly, per-class, salary, commission
Pay period locking to prevent retroactive changes
Full audit trail on every calculation

howItWorks.desc: Set pay rates for each coach: per-class flat fees, hourly rates, salary amounts, and commission percentages. Support different rates for different class types like kids programs vs. adult advanced.
As coaches teach classes and log private lessons, Gripmode calculates pay automatically based on actual attendance records. No spreadsheets, no manual counting, no mistakes.
Review the calculated payroll for any period, make adjustments if needed, then lock the period. Locked periods can't be altered retroactively, giving you a clean audit trail.

title: Events & Tournaments
tagline: Plan, promote, and run tournaments and events with built-in registration and bracket management.
metaDesc: Tournament and event management for martial arts schools. Registration, bracket management, and results tracking in one platform.

howItWorks.desc: Set up your event with dates, location, divisions, weight classes, and registration fees. Gripmode generates a professional event page with all the details participants need.
Students register online and are automatically sorted into the correct divisions based on their profile data — belt rank, age, weight class. No manual bracket building required.
On event day, manage brackets in real time. Record match results, track scores, and generate final standings. Post-event analytics show attendance, revenue, and participant feedback.

title: Analytics & Business Intelligence
tagline: Real-time dashboards that show exactly how your school is performing — no spreadsheets required.
metaDesc: Real-time analytics dashboard for martial arts schools. Track revenue, retention, attendance, and growth metrics across all locations.

howItWorks.desc: Your analytics dashboard is powered by real data from every part of Gripmode — memberships, attendance, payments, and more. No manual data entry or CSV imports needed.
Watch your key metrics update in real time. Revenue trends, member growth, retention rates, attendance patterns, and churn signals are all visualized in clean, actionable dashboards.
Drill into any metric to understand the why. Spot members at risk of churning before they leave. Compare location performance. Export reports for your accountant or business partner.

title: Member Management
tagline: One profile for every student. Attendance, payments, belt rank, notes — all in one place.
metaDesc: Complete member management for martial arts schools. Track attendance, belt ranks, payments, and student history in unified profiles.
benefits: Unified student profiles with full history

howItWorks.desc: Add new members with a streamlined enrollment form. Capture contact details, emergency info, belt rank, and membership plan. Students converted from your CRM carry over all their history.
Every interaction is logged automatically — class attendance, payments, belt promotions, notes from coaches, and communication history. One profile tells the complete story.
Use tags, filters, and bulk actions to manage your roster efficiently. Link family accounts for easy billing. Set up automated alerts for attendance drops or expiring memberships.

title: Inventory System
tagline: Track gis, equipment, and merchandise with real-time stock levels and low-stock alerts.
metaDesc: Inventory management for martial arts schools. Track products, monitor stock levels, get low-stock alerts, and maintain a full audit trail.
benefits: Low-stock alerts before you run out
Full audit trail on stock changes

howItWorks.desc: Build your product catalog with items like gis, rash guards, belts, and equipment. Define variants for size and color, set reorder thresholds, and assign prices.
Stock levels update automatically as you sell or distribute items. Multi-location inventory stays in sync. Low-stock alerts fire before you run out of popular sizes.
See which products sell fastest, which sizes need restocking, and your total inventory value. Every stock change is logged with who made it and why — giving you a complete audit trail.

title: Multi-Location Management
tagline: Run 2 schools or 20 from one dashboard. Centralized control, per-location detail.
metaDesc: Multi-location management for martial arts school chains. Centralized dashboard with per-location controls, reporting, and team management.

howItWorks.desc: Set up each location with its own schedule, staff, pricing, and settings. Each location operates independently day-to-day while rolling up to your centralized dashboard.
Assign staff to specific locations with role-based permissions. A coach at Location A only sees Location A. Owners and managers see everything across all locations.
Cross-location reports show which schools are outperforming and why. Compare retention rates, revenue per member, class utilization, and more — then replicate what works.

title: Team Management
tagline: Manage coaches, front desk staff, and assistants with role-based access and performance tracking.
metaDesc: Team management for martial arts schools. Role-based access, pay rate management, performance tracking, and location assignments.
benefits: Role-based access control (owner, coach, front desk)

howItWorks.desc: Add team members with their role, pay rates, and location assignments. Each role comes with pre-configured permissions — coaches see their classes, front desk handles check-ins, owners see everything.
Coaches set their availability, and you assign them to classes accordingly. When a coach calls out, quickly find an available substitute from the same location.
Track each team member's performance: classes taught, attendance rates in their classes, student retention, and private lesson bookings. Use data to reward top performers.

title: Operations Dashboard
tagline: Your school's command center. Everything you need to know, updated in real time.
metaDesc: Real-time operations dashboard for martial arts schools. Monitor members, revenue, attendance, and team performance at a glance.

howItWorks.desc: Your dashboard loads instantly with today's key metrics: active members, revenue this month, classes scheduled today, and any items that need your attention.
Watch the live check-in feed as students arrive. See today's class schedule with enrollment counts. Get alerted to retention risks, failed payments, and expiring memberships.
Quick-action buttons let you add a new member, send a message, adjust a schedule, or pull a report without navigating away. One dashboard, zero tab-switching.
